query:
ALTER TABLE pontaj 
  ADD COLUMN `isApproved` boolean DEFAULT false AFTER `notes`,
  ADD COLUMN `correctionRequested` boolean DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN `correctionNote` text;
